headline: Americans Respond to Financial Pressures With Smarter Spending and Increased Saving, New KeyBank Pulse Poll Finds
summary: Economic uncertainty hasn't slowed Americans down – it's spurred them into action. KeyBank's 2026 Financial Mobility Survey Pulse Poll, a follow-up to KeyBank's Financial Mobility Survey conducted in July 2025, reveals that, though concern about the economy has increased (rising from 26% in 2025 to 28% today across all income levels), Americans are responding to financial pressure with intention, adaptability, and proactive decision-making.
